en: Failure of your products could be life-threatening, which will help determine what kind of information we need from you.  In order to be approved to supply safety-critical products, you must have med or high listed.
What amount of risk do your product failures place on the health & safety of the users of your products?
High - i.e. Valves, Pumps, Chemicals, Cranes/Heavy Equipment, Rigging Equipment, etc.
Low - i.e. Bottled Water, Office Equipment, Catering, etc.
Medium - i.e. Lawn Care Equipment, Hand/Power Tools, etc.
